name: American Legion Park
description: American Legion Park is a place to play pickleball in Elizabethtown, KY. There are 12 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to water and restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Bluegrass Sportsplex
description: Bluegrass Sportsplex is a place to play pickleball in Elizabethtown, KY. There are 6 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts can be reserved.
open_play_schedule: Every player must have a waiver on file before playing.

name: Freeman Lake Park
description: Freeman Lake Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Elizabethtown, KY. There is 1 outdoor concrete court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is free. Reservations are not available.

name: Otto Fitness Center
description: Otto Fitness Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fort Knox, KY. There is 1 indoor wood court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court is free. Players have access to locker rooms and restrooms.
